title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Kesari Tours - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Kesari Tours - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Kesari Tours in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kesari Tours:
Kesari Tours is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kesari Tours!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
